channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Google Settles Racial Discrimination Lawsuit For $50 Million

media:content.media:description: The lawsuit, echoed years of complaints from Black employees at the company.

item.description: The suit claimed the company steered them into lower-level and lower-paid jobs and subjected them to a hostile work environment if they speak out.
item.content:encoded: The suit claimed the company steered them into lower-level and lower-paid jobs and subjected them to a hostile work environment if they speak out.

item.title: Marco Rubio Says US Ties With Church Can Withstand Trump-Pope Tensions

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump has criticised Pope Leo recently.

item.description: Marco Rubio, who visited the Vatican on Thursday, told reporters on Friday before leaving Rome the meeting was "very positive".
item.content:encoded: Marco Rubio, who visited the Vatican on Thursday, told reporters on Friday before leaving Rome the meeting was "very positive".

item.title: Trump Announces 3-Day Russia-Ukraine Ceasefire Starting Today

media:content.media:description: Volodymyr Zelensky, however, said the ceasefire "must be established"

item.description: Trump Announces 3-Day Russia-Ukraine Ceasefire Starting Saturday
item.content:encoded: Trump Announces 3-Day Russia-Ukraine Ceasefire Starting Saturday

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: UAE Reports New Strikes As US-Iran Ceasefire Hangs By Thread
item.description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships

item.title: Amazon's Chile Data Centre To Be Built As Residents Lose Green Challenge

media:content.media:description: In Chile overall, AWS has said it will invest more than $4 billion over the next 15 years.

item.description: Amazon Web Services said it aims for the data centre to consume minimal energy and water and that its plan had met the environmental requirements.
item.content:encoded: Amazon Web Services said it aims for the data centre to consume minimal energy and water and that its plan had met the environmental requirements.

item.title: 'Trying To Harm Our Exports': Iran Seizes Oil Tanker In Gulf Of Oman

media:content.media:description: The seizure came after US and Iranian forces clashed in the Strait of Hormuz. (Representational Image)

item.description: The oil tanker, which has been under US sanctions since February, was handed over to the judicial authorities.
item.content:encoded: The oil tanker, which has been under US sanctions since February, was handed over to the judicial authorities.

item.title: Exclusive: No Symptomatic Hantavirus Cases On MV Hondius, Says Cruise Operator

media:content.media:description: The hantavirus-stricken MV Hondius currently has no symptomatic patients

item.description: Oceanwide Expeditions told NDTV that there are currently "no symptomatic individuals" onboard the MV Hondius amid the ongoing hantavirus outbreak investigation. Two Indian crew members remain aboard the vessel.
item.content:encoded: Oceanwide Expeditions told NDTV that there are currently "no symptomatic individuals" onboard the MV Hondius amid the ongoing hantavirus outbreak investigation. Two Indian crew members remain aboard the vessel.

item.title: Pics: US Releases Fresh UFO Evidence After Years Of Secrecy

media:content.media:description: Additional files will be released by the Department of War on a rolling basis.

item.description: The Pentagon has started releasing a fresh set of files linked to Unidentified flying objects (UFO), or what the US government officially calls "unidentified anomalous phenomena" (UAPs), saying the public should be allowed to draw its own conclusions
item.content:encoded: The Pentagon has started releasing a fresh set of files linked to Unidentified flying objects (UFO), or what the US government officially calls "unidentified anomalous phenomena" (UAPs), saying the public should be allowed to draw its own conclusions

item.title: China Admits It Sent Experts To Pakistani Air Bases During Operation Sindoor

media:content.media:description: An overwhelming 81 per cent of Pakistan's military hardware is of Chinese origin.

item.description: This is the first time China has admitted that its personnel gave on-ground technical support to their Pakistani allies.
item.content:encoded: This is the first time China has admitted that its personnel gave on-ground technical support to their Pakistani allies.

item.title: Tanker Carrying Chinese Crew Attacked In Strait Of Hormuz: Beijing

media:content.media:description: The attacked vessel has not been officially identified. (Representational Image)

item.description: There are Chinese nationals aboard the vessel, but no reported crew casualties so far, foreign ministry spokesperson Lin Jian said.
item.content:encoded: There are Chinese nationals aboard the vessel, but no reported crew casualties so far, foreign ministry spokesperson Lin Jian said.

item.title: NASA's Webb Telescope Captures Clearest Picture Yet Of Exoplanet Surface

media:content.media:description: The observations suggest an ancient planetary surface covered by darkened regolith.

item.description: NASA's James Webb Space Telescope gathered data on a rocky exoplanet with a diameter about 30% larger than Earth - called LHS 3844 b, or Kua'kua.
item.content:encoded: NASA's James Webb Space Telescope gathered data on a rocky exoplanet with a diameter about 30% larger than Earth - called LHS 3844 b, or Kua'kua.

item.title: India Activates Precautionary Hantavirus Surveillance As Cruise Outbreak Grows

media:content.media:description: India activates precautionary surveillance measures as the hantavirus outbreak grows

item.description: India has activated precautionary surveillance measures after a deadly hantavirus outbreak aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship. The Health Ministry says two Indian nationals onboard remain asymptomatic and under observation.
item.content:encoded: India has activated precautionary surveillance measures after a deadly hantavirus outbreak aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship. The Health Ministry says two Indian nationals onboard remain asymptomatic and under observation.

item.title: Spirit Airlines Abandoned Dementia Patient At Texas Airport, Leading To His Death: Lawsuit

media:content.media:description: Spirit Airlines abandoned a 75-year-old dementia patient at Texas airport, leading to his death.

item.description: A lawsuit claims Spirit Airlines failed to assist a senior with dementia at Houston airport, causing a fatal accident.
item.content:encoded: A lawsuit claims Spirit Airlines failed to assist a senior with dementia at Houston airport, causing a fatal accident.

item.title: Hantavirus Confirmed: Two British Nationals Test Positive

media:content.media:description: Two British Nationals test positive for hantavirus

item.description: London, May 8 (IANS) Two British nationals have been confirmed to have contracted hantavirus, with a third suspected of infection, on the South Atlantic island of Tristan da Cunha, the UK Health Security Agency said on Friday.
item.content:encoded: London, May 8 (IANS) Two British nationals have been confirmed to have contracted hantavirus, with a third suspected of infection, on the South Atlantic island of Tristan da Cunha, the UK Health Security Agency said on Friday.

item.title: New Suspected Hantavirus Case Identified On Remote South Atlantic Island

media:content.media:description: The British health security agency did not disclose further details of the new suspected case.

item.description: The World Health Organisation said it would provide an update on the latest suspected and confirmed case numbers later on Friday.
item.content:encoded: The World Health Organisation said it would provide an update on the latest suspected and confirmed case numbers later on Friday.

item.title: ChatGPT's New 'Duty To Warn': Why Your AI Confessor Is No Longer Private

media:content.media:description: OpenAI's Trusted Contact alerts a real person if ChatGPT detects severe distress or self-harm risk

item.description: OpenAI's "Trusted Contact" rollout marks a tipping point: ChatGPT is moving from a silent assistant to a mandatory reporter. Are we ready for the end of the digital confessional?
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's "Trusted Contact" rollout marks a tipping point: ChatGPT is moving from a silent assistant to a mandatory reporter. Are we ready for the end of the digital confessional?

item.title: Hantavirus Cases Isolated: ICMR Says No Immediate Health Threat To India

media:content.media:description: Director of the ICMR's National Institute of Virology Dr Naveen Kumar

item.description: The Director of the ICMR's National Institute of Virology Dr Naveen Kumar on Friday said the cases appear to be isolated ones and there is no immediate public health threat to India.
item.content:encoded: The Director of the ICMR's National Institute of Virology Dr Naveen Kumar on Friday said the cases appear to be isolated ones and there is no immediate public health threat to India.

item.title: Inside Russia's Plan To Help Power Iran's Kill Machine Against Americans

media:content.media:description: Moscow's secret plan involved Russia sending 5,000 short-range fibre-optic drones to Iran

item.description: This is the first evidence that suggests Russia could have provided Tehran with innovative weapons in large enough numbers that could inflict many casualties on American and allied forces.
item.content:encoded: This is the first evidence that suggests Russia could have provided Tehran with innovative weapons in large enough numbers that could inflict many casualties on American and allied forces.

item.title: Spain Plans For Evacuations As A Hantavirus Hit Cruise Ship Heads For Canary Islands
item.description: Spanish authorities on Friday were preparing to receive more than 140 passengers and crew members on board a hantavirus-stricken cruise ship headed for the Canary Islands.
item.content:encoded: Spanish authorities on Friday were preparing to receive more than 140 passengers and crew members on board a hantavirus-stricken cruise ship headed for the Canary Islands.

item.title: Old Hantavirus Tweet Goes Viral: Experts Warn Against Panic, See List Of Reliable Resources

media:content.media:description: Public health experts warn that such viral posts often spread faster than verified medical information

item.description: A viral 2022 tweet resurfaced during the MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak, fuelling panic online. Experts explain why misinformation spreads during health scares and how people can verify facts before sharing alarming posts.
item.content:encoded: A viral 2022 tweet resurfaced during the MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak, fuelling panic online. Experts explain why misinformation spreads during health scares and how people can verify facts before sharing alarming posts.
